metadata.source: Hawaii State Golf Association + Manual Research

courses.name: Ala Wai Golf Course
courses.description: Located minutes from Waikiki along the Ala Wai Canal with views of Diamond Head. Honolulu's busiest municipal course featuring a flat, walker-friendly layout. The 18-hole course offers different yardage for men (5,861 yards, Par 70, Rating 66.8, Slope 115) and women (5,095 yards, Par 70, Rating 67.2, Slope 110). Features a full-service driving range open until 11 PM daily and L&L Hawaiian Grill restaurant. No twilight play until further notice.
courses.notes: Reservations: (808) 207-6856. Starter's Office: 808.733.7387. Driving Range: 808.779.9944. Pro shop currently closed. No twilight play until further notice. Resident Golf ID required for resident rates.

courses.name: Bay View Golf Park
courses.description: Windward Oahu semi-executive course with bay views
courses.specials: Early Bird (weekdays 6:30-8am): $33 | Twilight (after 3pm): $33 | Ladies Day Tuesday: $30 | Seniors Day Wednesday: $30

courses.name: Coral Creek Golf Course
courses.description: Premier 18-hole championship course designed by Robin Nelson in Ewa Beach. Features challenging layout with water hazards, including signature waterfall holes. Offers tiered pricing for residents and visitors, with special rates after aeration (April 13-26). Includes Pueo's Bar & Grill, full pro shop, driving range, and event hosting.

courses.name: 360° Ewa Beach Country Club
courses.address: 91-050 Fort Weaver Road, Ewa Beach, HI 96706
courses.description: Robin Nelson-designed championship links course on Leeward Oahu. Formerly Ewa Beach Golf Club.
courses.specials: Kama'aina Spring Special (Mar-Apr): Weekday after 9am $65, Weekday Twilight $45 | Twilight specials
courses.notes: Rebranded from Ewa Beach Golf Club. Transportation available from Waikiki and Aulani. Ancient Hawaiian fishing village remains on site.

courses.name: Ewa Villages Golf Course
courses.description: A very challenging links-style layout where wind is a critical factor. Features relatively tight fairways where accuracy is a premium. Located in Leeward Oahu, 32 miles from downtown Honolulu (approximately 50-minute drive from Waikiki hotels). The 18-hole course offers different yardage for men (6,455 yards, Par 73, Rating 70.9, Slope 122) and women (5,595 yards, Par 73, Rating 73.6, Slope 124). No pro shop or restaurant currently available.
courses.notes: Reservations: (808) 207-6741. No Twilight Play Until Further Notice. Play limited to 9 holes during aeration days. No pro shop or restaurant on-site. Resident Golf ID required for resident rates.

courses.name: Hawaii Country Club
courses.description: Public golf in central Oahu near Wahiawa. Under new management (Stella Greens) with recently renovated facilities.

rates.note: New lower rates under Stella Greens management

courses.notes: Under new management as of 2024. New lower rates with renovated facilities.

courses.name: Hawaii Kai Golf Course
courses.description: Located just 13 miles east of Waikiki, Hawaii Kai Golf Course features two distinct 18-hole courses. The Championship Course is a William Bell-designed layout featuring challenging elevation changes and skilled dogleg holes with breathtaking views of Moloka'i in the distance. The Executive Course is a Robert Trent Jones-designed 18-hole Par-3 course overlooking Oahu's east shore and renowned Sandy Beach Park - perfect for beginners, juniors, or those honing their iron and short game skills.

courses.name: Hawaii Prince Golf Club
courses.address: 91-1200 Fort Weaver Road, Ewa Beach, HI 96706
courses.description: Designed by Arnold Palmer and Ed Seay, Hawaii Prince Golf Club offers three interchangeable nines and 27 holes to create a variety of playing conditions for all skill levels. Opened in July 1992, the course features 270 acres offering stunning views of the rain-carved Waianae Mountains, long verdant fairways lined with numerous white sand bunkers and 10 strategically placed lakes. The A-C combination from the back tees is the most challenging (slope 134), while A-B is the least difficult. Home of the Quick Shot Par 3 course.

a_course.name: A Course
a_course.features: 10 lakes, white sand bunkers, signature hole A7

c_course.name: C Course
c_course.features: Signature holes C2 & C7, challenging layout

courses.specials: Kama'aina Mon-Wed: $59 before 11am, $49 after | Quick Shot Par 3: $50-$70 | Twilight rates available

courses.name: Kahuku Golf Course
courses.description: 9-hole municipal course on the North Shore. Closest course on Oahu to real links seaside layout. Walking only.
courses.notes: 9-hole municipal course. Aeration dates may affect play. Walking only.

courses.name: Kapolei Golf Club
courses.description: Former LPGA Tour venue (2013-2018) known for immaculate conditions. Bermuda fairways and bent grass greens. 15-minute drive from Ko Olina.
courses.specials: Twilight rates starting 1:30pm | Replay rates based on availability
courses.notes: Credit/Debit cards only, no cash. Dress code: Collared shirt, no tank tops or slippers. Reservations: Visitors 90 days, Kama'aina 7 days.

courses.name: Ko Olina Golf Club

courses.specials: Advanced Special: 50% off rental clubs (book 10+ days ahead) | Aloha Package: $325 | Multi-Round: 2=$225, 4=$205, 10=$175 | Kids Play Free after 3PM

courses.name: Ko'olau Golf Club (CLOSED)
courses.description: DRAMATIC MOUNTAIN GOLF COURSE - PERMANENTLY CLOSED September 30, 2020. Was known for breathtaking views at the base of the Ko'olau Range.
courses.notes: Permanently closed. Was a dramatic mountain course at the base of the Ko'olau Range known for stunning views and challenging play.

courses.name: Makaha Valley Country Club
courses.description: Golf on the Leeward coast in Makaha Valley with ocean and valley views
courses.specials: Military discounts available | Best rates through online booking
courses.notes: Rates are dynamic and vary. Call for current pricing.

courses.name: Mid-Pacific Country Club
courses.description: Premier private country club in Kailua on Windward Oahu

courses.name: Mililani Golf Club
courses.description: Public golf in Mililani with mountain views and challenging elevation changes
courses.specials: Loyalty Program: Up to 20% off rack rates
courses.notes: Aeration typically April-May timeframe with discounted rates

courses.name: Moanalua Golf Club
courses.description: Hawaii's oldest golf course since 1898 and one of the oldest in the United States. Located in the stunning Moanalua Valley, this 9-hole course was designed by Scottish architect Donald MacIntyre. Public play is welcome daily after 10:30 AM - no membership required. Non-members can make reservations up to 3 days in advance. Call ahead to reserve your tee time. Members enjoy exclusive access to tee times before 10:30 AM daily.

rates.note: Public rates for non-members. Membership available: $250 initiation + $250/month (includes free green fees for family). Special offer: $125/month for afternoon play after 2:00 PM.

courses.name: Barbers Point Golf Course (Navy)
courses.description: Navy golf course at Barbers Point

courses.description: Popular military course near Pearl Harbor

courses.name: Oahu Country Club
courses.description: Historic private club founded in 1906 in Nuuanu Valley

courses.name: Olomana Golf Links
courses.description: Challenging links-style course on Windward Oahu with Ko'olau views

courses.name: Pali Golf Course
courses.description: Picturesque and challenging hillside course on Windward Oahu, set in the foothills of the Ko'olau range. The 18-hole course offers different yardage for men (6,605 yards, Par 72, Rating 71.1, Slope 113) and women (6,121 yards, Par 74, Rating 74.5, Slope 127). Features a pro shop operated by Power Golf Hawaii with club rentals and merchandise.
amenities: Pro Shop (Power Golf Hawaii, 7 AM - 4 PM)
courses.notes: Reservations: (808) 207-7099. Starter's Office: 808.266.7612. Pro Shop: 808.262.2911. No Twilight Play Until Further Notice. Restaurant temporarily vacant. Resident Golf ID required for resident rates.

courses.name: Pearl at Kalauao
courses.description: Formerly known as Pearl Country Club, the newly transformed Pearl at Kalauao is now a premier championship course with upgraded, premium facilities. Originally designed by Akira Sato in 1967, this par-72 course has long offered golfers both a challenge and breathtaking views of Puʻuloa (Pearl Harbor) and the Waiʻanae mountains. In 2020, ownership returned to Kamehameha Schools. Features the new Nā Momi ʻEkolu 3-hole pitch & putt course for quick play and short game practice.

rates.note: Download mobile app for Kama'aina rates. Book online for non-resident rates.

courses.name: Royal Hawaiian Golf Club
courses.description: Opened in 1993, Royal Hawaiian Golf Club was the first course co-designed by renowned architects Peter and Perry Dye and recently redesigned by golf hall-of-famer Greg Norman. Nestled between the majestic Mount Olomana and Ko'olau Mountains in historic Maunawili Valley (formerly Luana Hills), this course is an awe-inspiring experience with Oahu's most stunning views. Far from the crowds and traffic of Honolulu, treat yourself to the lush fairways and manicured greens of this par-72 course.

courses.name: Royal Kunia Country Club
courses.description: Unique target-style course with dramatic elevation changes

courses.name: Ted Makalena Golf Course
courses.address: 93-059 Waipio Point Access Road, Waipahu, HI 96797
courses.description: Located on the Waipahu peninsula with views of Pearl Harbor, Ted Makalena Golf Course is a municipal course operated by the City & County of Honolulu. The 18-hole course features different yardage and par for men (5,976 yards, Par 71) and women (5,551 yards, Par 73). Known for affordable rates and being one of the most accessible courses on Oahu for residents.
